diagrams.title: Incremental Process Model Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the cyclic flow of the incremental model with four phases and feedback loops
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the iterative nature and how feedback from each increment improves subsequent ones

diagrams.title: Increments Timeline
diagrams.description: Visual representation of multiple increments building upon each other over time
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how each increment adds to the previous one, with each being a working subset

diagrams.title: Waterfall vs Incremental Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing linear vs iterative approach
diagrams.purpose: Understanding differences between traditional and incremental approaches

diagrams.title: MVP Development Path
diagrams.description: Shows how Minimum Viable Product evolves through feedback into complete product
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how early delivery and feedback drives product development

visuals.title: Incremental Process Models
visuals.description: Visual diagram for incremental process models
